creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 165229
audio/opusfile: version0.7

Newer version has been released: opusfile-0.7

Changes of audio/opusfile:
 - Enhance inline patches to make it applied only once.
 - Update patch file in 'makepatch' style.
 - Explicitly disable to build example codes that are not installed.

=== From upstream notes http://www.opus-codec.org/downloads/ ===
Changes since the v0.6 release:

  • Add API to access and preserve binary metadata.
  • Add support for R128_ALBUM_GAIN metadata tag.
  • Better seeking with continued packets and multiplexed streams.
  • Portability and build fixes.

This release is backward-compatible with the previous release but
contains updates to conform with the latest IETF Ogg Opus draft,
important performance enhancements, and bug fixes. We recommend
all users upgrade.
